%PLAYERNAME%, this may be bigger than Mewtwo alone.
Team GO Rocket Leader Arlo has been spotted in the area, and I’m not buying that it’s a coincidence. This has to be connected to capturing Mewtwo.
Partner Research – Forever Forward: AEON Mall
Pokémon GO Lab...Big Adventure! Timed Research
Pokémon GO Lab...Big Adventure! Timed Research (1/1)
Heya, %PLAYERNAME%! What a treat to spend my birthday in the field with you. To celebrate the occasion, I’ve got a little surprise as well!
Meet my research assistant, Pikachu! It’s even wearing a special outfit inspired by my own. I’m so flattered!
With my new assistant helping us along the way, let’s make this a birthday to remember. I’m sure we’ll uncover some fascinating discoveries together.
These discoveries are a gift! Speaking of which, why don’t we share a few Gifts with friends while we’re at it? A celebration is always better when everyone’s included!
Great work! This special outing of ours is already shaping up to be a real success.
Pikachu has been helping me gather reports from all over. It’s amazing how much we can discover when we all work together.
Our findings are even more meaningful when they’re shared. It’s a great way to connect us with our community, just like the Gifts we sent!
Let’s keep going, %PLAYERNAME%. There’s sure to be even more delightful discoveries awaiting us!
This has been so much fun, %PLAYERNAME%! Today’s research truly made for a wonderful celebration.
Looking back on the past 10 years, I’m reminded that every observation, every discovery, and every step we’ve taken together has led us here.
And now, with a bright new assistant helping me in the field, I have a feeling our future research will be even more lively and full of inspiration.
The world of Pokémon is still overflowing with wonders to discover, and our adventure is far from over. Until next time, %PLAYERNAME%!
